title: Quiz: what EXPLAIN ANALYZE reveals
prompt_md: You prefix a slow query with `EXPLAIN ANALYZE`. What does it give you?
options: It automatically rewrites your query to be faster
It shows the query plan plus real execution timings, so you can spot things like a sequential scan where an index is missing
It permanently caches the query result for next time
It only estimates the plan without ever running the query
explanation_md: `EXPLAIN ANALYZE` actually runs the query and prints the plan the database chose along with the real time each step took — letting you catch a Seq Scan on a large table that signals a missing index. Plain `EXPLAIN` only estimates without running; `EXPLAIN ANALYZE` does run it. It diagnoses the problem but doesn't rewrite your query or cache results for you.
